response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and some C/C++ IDE work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI), but lacks the core required stack for this role. There is minimal Java exposure (limited to robotic-arms and device-orchestration projects years ago), no Kotlin, no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, and no demonstrated JVM internals depth. The IDE-tooling interest is present but in a C/C++ context, not JVM language tooling.
strengths: Prior IDE/developer-tooling work on NI LabWindows/CVI (C IDE internals)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing libraries
Long track record on complex systems across multiple languages and domains
concerns: No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience listed
No Kotlin and only marginal, dated Java experience — no demonstrated JVM depth
Recent work is TypeScript/Node and AI-agent tooling, not enterprise JVM ecosystems

key_factors.factor: Prior C IDE tooling experience at National Instruments
